final:
module bitwise_and_module(
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [3:0] binary_num1,
    input wire [3:0] binary_num2,
    output reg [3:0] and_result
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            and_result <= 0;
        end else begin
            and_result <= binary_num1 & binary_num2;
        end
    end

endmodule
